title: InteritusCraft
description: Explore long-time abandoned world full of dangers and find out what happened...
body:
_**WARNING:**_

This modpack is still in Alpha. So expect various things from crashes. low TPS, frame drops, bugs etc. 

**Changing functional settings is not recommended.** Change configs just **if you know, what you're doing**, otherwise don't complain!

**Don't update the mods.** 

If you happened to spawn in an ocean, just create a new world, I have no solution for this right now.

Also set **allocated memory** to **10 GB** and **remove ALL java arguments** or you will experience poor performance.

I recommend you using in-built mod "Chunky" to pre-generate chunks to avoid lags.

- /chunky radius 2000 - this will set radius to 2000 blocks from the center of overworld
- /chunky world minecraft:overworld - this sets dimension where to pre-gen
- /chunky start - starts pre-generating chunks

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8a3dccd2fc1c01440aca8552db3ee4b0f75da23_0.webp)

_Description:_

You are the last human on Earth in a post-apocalyptic world. You don't remember what happened, who you are and where you are. All you can see are ruins what was in some time called a civilization. Big cities are long time abandoned, or aren't they? You are now curious - who is to blame for everything you see? That humans went extinct? How long have you been alone? Well, you might find out the answears sooner than you may think.

This modpack aims for a great but non-impactful lore (mainly in books found in the loot) enhanced by hard survival mechanics, dangerous creatures compensated by tech mods and gun mods. You can also enjoy scenery of big abandoned cities (Lost Cities custom datapack), travel another planets or visit new dimensions.

**_WARNING:_** This modpack also include some **gore** stuff like **blood, corpses of animals** etc.

**_What included mods add:_**

- guns, armour and various weapons
- seasons, custom terrain, new biomes, dimensions, space
- new food, drinks
- custom survival mechanics (thirst, heat, tiredness, sanity etc.)
- custom cities (more structures planned)
- custom loot in cities
- more intelligent and stronger hostile mobs
- new hostile mobs
- refreshed vanilla features
- included photon v1.2a shaders custom settings (download the shaders by yourself)
- and many more!

**_Recommended hardware (24 chunks render distance + Photon shaders, 1080p):_**

CPU - Ryzen 5600x

RAM - 16GB DDR4 3600MHz

GPU - RTX 2070/3060

Let me know in the comments (on CurseForge) about any issue you find! :)

Official Discord server for the modpack:
https://discord.gg/abSFJr6HyT

_**Special thanks to:**_ McJty, keerdm, Untrustedlife, TqLxQuanZ, Bogdan_Off, MaxHyper, Emanatnawtnodi, Xotics (made discord server), Arky (playtester) and every other person, who helped me even a little bit with the development!

If you really enjoy my work and want to help me a bit, you can donate me on Ko-fi!
**_[https://ko-fi.com/lughtmon](https://ko-fi.com/lughtmon)_**
